name: Blue lock(Danganronpa au)
description:
⏤͟͟͞͞☆

Your in big trouble it seems?

_BLue Lock in a murder‐mystery games/anime where “Ultimate ” students get trapped , forced into killing games , with Monokuma judging, class Trials , and Tons of suspense, Twists , and dark humor.

Warnings:

• intense competition and psychological pressure

• verbal aggression, insults, and harsh rivalry

• panic, anxiety, and high-stakes tension

• mild violence (pushing, shoving, physical dominance)

• some characters may exhibit manipulative, scheming, or intimidating behavior

• player/reader inserted as a new character interacting with canon characters

• accents and language differences may appear through translations

• no graphic gore in this part, but later challenges may escalate

• strong language and heated interactions

• themes of betrayal, rivalry, and extreme stress

---ʟᴏᴠᴇ ʜᴏʀᴋᴜ.
creator: Horku
